import io

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let n = match parse::<Int>(s)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    mut a = 0
    mut b = 1
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      let t = a + b
      a = b
      b = t
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("fib=#{a}")
  when None
    println("fib=0")
  end
end
